did.unittitle: Street trees: their care and preservation
did.abstract: Typescript manuscript with photographs, annotated by Liberty Hyde Bailey. Published by Cornell University College of Agriculture Dept. of Rural Art (Extension Work) as Bulletin 256.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Typescript manuscript with photographs, annotated by Liberty Hyde Bailey. Published by Cornell University College of Agriculture Dept. of Rural Art (Extension Work) as Bulletin 256.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Albert Davis Taylor. Street Trees: Their Care and Preservation, #21-24-2501. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Street Trees: Their Care and Preservation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Typescript manuscript with photographs, annotated by Liberty Hyde Bailey. Published by Cornell University College of Agriculture Department of Rural Art (Extension Work) as Bulletin 256
